description: Finicity, a Mastercard company, provides open finance and account connectivity services in the United States. Its products support use cases such as payments, money management, account aggregation, and lending data access.
summary: finicity.com’s public developer integration surface is Mastercard Open Finance US (Finicity) HTTP APIs, documented on developer.mastercard.com and authenticated with partner-issued credentials that produce a short-lived access token plus an app key header.
